results.claim_text: Detection often requires ﬁne-grained visual infor- mation so we increase the input resolution of the network from 224 × 224 to 448 × 448.

matched_evidence.sentence_text: We pretrain the convolutional layers on the ImageNet classiﬁcation task at half the resolution (224 × 224 input image) and then double the resolution for detection.

notes: Matched related text evidence with similar numeric value.
